channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: WHO chief raises alarm after Israeli attacks on Iranian oil facilities
item.description: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus says children, the elderly at particular risk after damage to Iranian petroleum facilities.

item.title: How the Iran war is affecting Africa
item.description: Before the start of the war between Israel, US and Iran, Africa was on track for its biggest economic moment in history.

item.title: Trump says Australia has ‘taken care of’ some Iranian women footballers
item.description: Players' union FIFPRO expressed serious concerns for team after criticism for not singing anthem before first match.

item.title: France preparing to escort ships in Strait of Hormuz when war calms: Macron
item.description: French president says 'purely defensive' mission aims to gradually reopen key Gulf waterway amid spike in oil prices.

item.title: US senators demand probe into ‘appalling’ attack on girls’s school in Iran
item.description: Top Democrats say Minab school bombing that killed at least 170 people 'must be fully and impartially reviewed'.

item.title: US military kills six in strike on alleged drug boat in the Eastern Pacific
item.description: The US military claims six men killed in a strike on a suspected drug-smuggling boat in the eastern Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Turkiye says Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO air defences
item.description: Ministry of National Defence says no casualties or damage after missile shot down over southern city of Gaziantep.

item.title: What defence support could Ukraine offer Middle East states amid Iran war?
item.description: Ukraine has built low-cost drones to counter Russian attacks with imported Iranian Shahed drones.

item.title: Iran’s authorities showcase continuity as they back new leader during war
item.description: The IRGC says its forces are ready to 'fully obey and sacrifice for the divine commands' after new supreme leader named.

item.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian journalist Amal Shamali in Gaza attack
item.description: Shamali, who worked for Qatar Radio, killed in an Israeli air strike on central Gaza's Nuseirat refugee camp.
